scripts.test:memory: tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --skipLibCheck --types bun --rewriteRelativeImportExtensions --outDir /tmp/opencode-memory-compiled-test plugin/memory/smoke.ts && node /tmp/opencode-memory-compiled-test/smoke.js
scripts.test: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:english-guard && pnpm run test:permission-gate && pnpm run test:bash-plugin && pnpm run test:webfetch && pnpm run test:webfetch-plugin && pnpm run test:memory
